items.title: What to Look for in an Exposure Management Platform (And What Most of Them Get Wrong)
items.summary: Every security team has a version of the same story. The quarter ends with hundreds of vulnerabilities closed. The dashboards are bursting with green. Then someone in a leadership meeting asks: "So, are we actually safer...

items.title: Presentation: AI-Powered SRE for Autonomous Incident Response
items.summary: The presenters discuss incident response, how AI-enhanced SRE platforms connect signals from logs, metrics, traces, and historical incidents to enable autonomous decisions. By Rohit Dhawan, Pavan Madduri, Alina Astapovic...

items.title: CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
items.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to secure their Windows systems against a vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks. [...]
